name: 7 Chakra Rice Chain Necklace – 24K Gold Tone Plated
details:
7 Chakra Rice Chain Necklace – 24K Gold Tone Plated

Subtitle

Alignment | Inner Balance | Everyday Energy

Product Description

Carry balance with a clean golden shine. This 7 Chakra Rice Chain Necklace brings seven chakra-inspired beads together with a sleek 24K Gold Tone Plated Rice Chain, creating a meaningful jewellery piece that feels spiritual, stylish, and easy to wear every day.

The colourful chakra beads represent energy alignment, inner calm, positivity, confidence, clarity, and grounding. Paired with the rice-style golden chain, it gives a premium look without feeling too heavy or loud.

Key Highlights

• 7 Chakra Bead Design
Features seven colourful chakra-inspired beads that symbolise balance from Root to Crown energy.

• 24K Gold Tone Plated Rice Chain
The chain has a sleek rice-style pattern with a polished golden finish for a clean and premium look.

• Meaningful Everyday Jewellery
A perfect piece for people who want spiritual styling with a modern golden jewellery feel.

• Lightweight & Comfortable
Easy to wear daily with casual outfits, office looks, festive wear, or meditation styling.

• Premium Minimal Look
The colourful beads add meaning, while the golden chain keeps the design elegant and wearable.

Benefits

• Supports a balanced and positive mindset
• Represents all 7 chakras in one jewellery piece
• Helps you carry a calm, focused, and grounded energy
• Adds a stylish spiritual touch to everyday outfits
• Great choice for gifting, meditation lovers, and crystal jewellery users

Product Specification

Product Name: 7 Chakra Rice Chain Necklace
Chain Type: Rice Chain
Chain Finish: 24K Gold Tone Plated
Chain Base: Stainless Steel
Beads: 7 Chakra Inspired Multi-Colour Beads
Bead Shape: Round Smooth-Polished Beads
Style: Spiritual, Minimal, Premium, Everyday Wear
Ideal For: Daily wear, gifting, meditation, festive styling, casual outfits
Care: Avoid water, perfume, sweat, and harsh chemicals. Store in a dry pouch or jewellery box after use.

How To Use / Style

Wear it around your neck as a daily spiritual jewellery piece. Style it with plain T-shirts, shirts, kurtas, festive outfits, or meditation wear. For longer shine, keep it away from water and perfume and wipe gently after use.

FAQs

Q1. What is special about this necklace?
It combines seven chakra-inspired beads with a 24K gold tone plated rice chain, giving both spiritual meaning and premium styling.

Q2. Can I wear it daily?
Yes, it is lightweight and easy to style for daily wear, office looks, casual outfits, and festive occasions.

Q3. What do the 7 chakra beads represent?
They represent balance, grounding, confidence, positivity, communication, clarity, and inner calm.

Q4. Is the chain gold plated?
It has a 24K gold tone plated finish with a sleek rice-chain texture.

Q5. How should I maintain it?
Avoid direct contact with water, perfume, sweat, and chemicals. Store it separately in a dry pouch or jewellery box.
